---
dataset-title: "Boil Water Advisories"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="../../project_dataset_style.css">

<div class="dataset-container">
    <!-- Header Section -->
    <header class="dataset-header">
        <p class="header-tagline">Project Dataset</p>
        <h2 class="header-title"> {{< meta dataset-title >}}</h2>
        <div class="header-buttons">
            <a href="Boil_Water_Advisories/Boil_Water_Advisories_KS.xlsx" class="btn btn-download" download>
                <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-spreadsheet-fill icon"></i> Download KS Boil Water Advisories (.xlsx)
            </a>

            <a href="Boil_Water_Advisories/Annual Compliance Report  - KDHE Links.pdf" class="btn btn-download" download>
                <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf-fill icon"></i> Download Annual Compliance Report (.pdf)
            </a>

            <a href="../projects/project_Boil_Water_Advisories.html" class="btn btn-project">
                <i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill icon"></i> View Project Page
            </a>

            <a href="../classplan/class_Boil_Water_Advisories.html" class="btn btn-classplan">
                <i class="bi bi-book-half icon"></i> View the Class Plan
            </a>

        </div>
    </header>
</div>
```

::: content-card
## About the Data

This dataset supports analysis of boil water advisories and contaminant patterns across Kansas communities. It includes two files:

-   **Boil_Water_Advisories_KS.xlsx** — scraped data on boil order warnings and advisories from the KDHE website.
-   **Annual Compliance Report - KDHE Links.pdf** — a reference document with links to KDHE annual compliance reports.
:::
